overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a nighttime exploration of a rain-soaked futuristic urban environment. The player character walks through neon-lit streets, descends from elevated walkways, passes pedestrians, and explores a roadside area before returning to a hotel intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated pedestrian terrace with glass railings and outdoor seating overlooking lower streets

events.description: descending stairs from elevated terrace down to street level

agents.ego_description: walking across an elevated terrace with glass railings and outdoor furniture, then descending stairs to street level

entered.detail: transparent glass safety railings lining the elevated walkway
tables and chairs arranged on the terrace for outdoor dining
green neon sign with 'OSOS' text on distant building
large green neon sign reading 'HOTEL' on tall building facade
tall vertical digital billboard displaying a woman's portrait

segments.scene_description: The scene opens on an elevated pedestrian terrace with glass railings and outdoor seating furniture. Green neon signs including 'OSOS' and 'HOTEL' illuminate the background against the night sky. The player descends stairs from the terrace down to street level, transitioning from the elevated walkway to the narrow streets below.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow urban alley between concrete buildings with neon storefronts

events.description: passing under bright pink neon signs casting colored reflections on wet pavement

agents.ego_description: walking through a narrow street lined with concrete buildings and illuminated neon signs

notable_agents.action: distant pedestrian walking away down the alley ahead

entered.detail: bright pink neon signage attached to building facade
tall concrete walls of surrounding buildings creating a canyon effect

segments.scene_description: The player moves through a narrow urban alley flanked by concrete building facades. Bright pink neon signs illuminate the wet pavement, creating colorful reflections. The 'HOTEL' sign and vertical billboard remain visible but shift position as the player advances through the enclosed space.

scene_state.functional_zone: open street plaza with building overhangs and approaching roadway

events.description: passing a pedestrian in white tank top walking in the opposite direction
approaching roadside with concrete barrier railing overlooking lower level

agents.ego_description: walking along the open street and passing a pedestrian wearing a white tank top and cap

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in white tank top and cap walking past the camera in the opposite direction

entered.detail: concrete safety barrier with vertical slits overlooking the lower road level
building facade with illuminated signage extending over the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The environment opens into a wider street plaza with building overhangs. The player passes a pedestrian in a white tank top walking the opposite way. The scene transitions toward a roadside area with concrete barrier railings, and the vertical billboard shifts to the left as the player approaches the road edge.

scene_state.functional_zone: roadside walkway with concrete railing overlooking lower street level near hotel intersection

events.description: pausing to look over the concrete railing at the lower road level
turning around to walk back toward the hotel and Pacific Blvd intersection

agents.ego_description: pausing to look over the roadside railing at the lower level, then turning and walking back toward the hotel area

entered.detail: street sign reading 'Pacific Blvd' mounted on a pole near the intersection
view through the railing slits showing the lower street level with wet pavement

segments.scene_description: The player stands at a roadside walkway with concrete railings overlooking a lower street level, observing the wet pavement below. After pausing to look over the edge, the player turns around and walks back toward the intersection, where the 'HOTEL' neon sign and 'Pacific Blvd' street sign become prominent again.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from an elevated urban terrace down into the neon-lit depths of a rain-soaked city street. It begins on a pedestrian terrace with glass railings and green neon signs, descending a set of stairs that transitions the perspective from the high walkway to the narrow streets below. As the camera moves forward, the environment tightens into a concrete alley where bright pink neon signs cast colorful reflections across the wet pavement. The scene then opens into a wider street plaza, passing a pedestrian in a white tank top before shifting toward a roadside area defined by concrete barrier railings. Finally, after pausing to look over the edge at the lower street level, the camera turns back toward the intersection where the hotel and Pacific Blvd signs emerge once more.
